prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-RED-WHITE-TIE-DOWN-6-IN-4PK Product Type: BUNGEE_CORD Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor White Stretch Bungee Cord with Red Ball Tie Down 6" (4) Description: Keep your camping and other outdoor equipment secured and organized with the ASR Outdoor Red and White Stretch Bungee Cord Tiedowns.

This set of stretch bungee cords are constructed of natural rubber with a polypropylene cover, and feature durable plastic balls to tie down canopies, boat covers, fishing poles and more. The red ball makes it easy to spot.

These multi-purpose stretch cords will come in handy time and time again, so make sure you keep it in your garage, camping gear, boat or car. Search Terms: Bungee Cord Tie Down Ball End Features: - Heavy Duty - Ball End - Red and White - Great for Securing Tarps, Canopies, and More! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pk 6in Red and White Bungee Cord Tie Down

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pk 6 in White Bungee Cord Tie Down

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Ball End, Natural Rubber With Polypropylene Cover, Secures Tarps Canopies And Boat Covers

openai.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty, Natural Rubber Core, Polypropylene Cover, Red Ball Ends, Secures Tarps Canopies Boat Covers
